messages.content: Your need for validation still seems to be the loudest thing about you.
I know, Samantha. But I also can't wait for you to make use of me or abuse me for your amusement.
I know, Samantha. But I also can't wait for you to make use of me or abuse me for your amusement.
That eagerness is cute. Tell me, what makes you think you're ready for that kind of dynamic?
It doesn't matter if I am ready. Who would ask a rag if it is ready to wipe out the dirt from the floor?
So now you're a rag. That's a new one. What else are you willing to be, just to prove your point?
